data.final_message: This needs your approval to run — it will reinstall the package in editable mode so pytest can see the new `camera.py` module. Want me to proceed, or would you rather run it yourself?

Committed. Added `Camera` dataclass with `ray_for_pixel` (pinhole projection using an orthonormal basis from `origin`/`look_at`/`up`) in `src/myraytracer/camera.py`, plus tests covering the straight-down--Z center pixel, a hand-computed off-center direction, and the degenerate 1×1 image case. Also added `pythonpath = ["src"]` to pytest config so the src-layout package imports without an editable install. Tests (17) and ruff both pass; work is committed on `mycoder/my-raytracer-3` as `c38de5a`.

Closed issue #4: added `Material`, `Hit`, `Sphere`, and `Plane` in `src/myraytracer/material.py`/`geometry.py`, with tests covering hit/miss/tangent/t-range cases and invalid-radius/near-zero-normal rejection. All 27 tests pass, ruff is clean, and the work is committed on `mycoder/my-raytracer-4`.

Done. Added `PointLight` and `Scene` (with `nearest_hit`) closing issue #5, plus tests covering the plane-in-front-of-sphere, empty-scene, and out-of-range cases. All tests and ruff pass; committed as `2308c46`.

Done. Implemented `trace_ray` and `render_pixel` in `src/myraytracer/tracer.py`:

- `trace_ray`: finds nearest hit, adds emission, loops over point lights with shadow-ray occlusion testing and inverse-square Lambertian falloff, then recurses via cosine-weighted hemisphere sampling for indirect bounces (with a one-line comment on why cosine/PDF cancel), applying Russian-roulette termination once `max_depth < 2`.
- `render_pixel`: averages `spp` jittered `trace_ray` samples for AA/noise reduction.

Done. Issue #7 is closed: `image.py` (binary PPM writer) and `render.py` (deterministic full-image render loop) added with tests, all passing pytest and ruff, committed to `mycoder/my-raytracer-7`. No push/PR performed, as instructed.
